name: Zen
description: A simple app for focused and private note-taking
compose:
name: slashnode-zen
services:
  app:
    image: ghcr.io/sheshbabu/zen/zen:1.5.0
    container_name: zen
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    volumes:
      - app_data-app:/data
      - app_data-images:/images
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8894:8080
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  app_data-app:
    name: slashnode-zen_app_data-app
  app_data-images:
    name: slashnode-zen_app_data-images
